channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 14.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): John Healey resigns as defence secretary in disagreement with Starmer over spending – UK politics live
item.description: John Healey resigns as defence secretary in disagreement with Starmer over spending – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer ally says defence spending plan falls short at ‘dangerous’ time in scathing letter
item.description: John Healey resigns latest: Starmer ally says defence spending plan falls short at ‘dangerous’ time in scathing letter

item.title: Bluesky · @samfr.bsky.social: The saga over this plan and this sorry conclusion is going to be *the* case study of why Starmer failed as PM.
item.description: The saga over this plan and this sorry conclusion is going to be *the* case study of why Starmer failed as PM.

item.title: FT UK Politics: Burnham rules out cash for Waspi women after Labour backlash
item.description: Burnham rules out cash for Waspi women after Labour backlash

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK defence secretary resigns over spending plan
item.description: UK defence secretary resigns over spending plan

item.title:
Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: “The truth is that ministers have not the faintest clue what to do”.
@gsoh31.bsky.social writes on the quiet collapse of Britain’s universities and why so few people seem to care. www.arguably.uk/p/the-quiet-...
item.description:
“The truth is that ministers have not the faintest clue what to do”.
@gsoh31.bsky.social writes on the quiet collapse of Britain’s universities and why so few people seem to care. www.arguably.uk/p/the-quiet-...

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: I think the key to understanding Starmer is that he believes a decision is tough and serious purely because he’s made it.
item.description: I think the key to understanding Starmer is that he believes a decision is tough and serious purely because he’s made it.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Could this woman determine who will be Britain’s next prime minister?
item.description: Could this woman determine who will be Britain’s next prime minister?

item.title: Novara Media: Could This Gamble Kill the Labour Party?
item.description: Could This Gamble Kill the Labour Party?

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: All of this between Starmer *and* Burnham would be incredibly funny if we were starting our first year back in the comfort zone of opposition but....sorry brb just checking how best to protect my savings when Reform c...
item.description: All of this between Starmer *and* Burnham would be incredibly funny if we were starting our first year back in the comfort zone of opposition but....sorry brb just checking how best to protect my savings when Reform c...
